cot_prefix: Okay, let's read the passage carefully to answer the question correctly. The question asks us to infer something from the passage, so we need to find the best option based on what the passage says. Let's look at each option: (A) volleyball develops from the game of "mintonette" - The passage says that William G.Morgan created the game of "mintonette" which later became volleyball. So, this is a direct statement and not an inference. (B) most of the competitive volleyball teams are in the college - The passage mentions that there are many types of teams, including high school, college, women, men, children, mixed teams, etc. But it doesn't state that most are in college. So, this is not an inference from the passage. (C) the rules of volleyball continue to change as they are easy to learn - The passage says the rules continued to change and adjust until the game became what we have today. However, it does not say the reason for the changes was because they are easy to learn. So, this is not an inference from the passage.
